title: Pleurothallis lagarophyta
taxonomy: Pleurothallis lagarophyta is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. More specifically, it is placed within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This orchid is further grouped within the tribe Maxillarieae. At the genus level, Pleurothallis lagarophyta is assigned to the genus Pleurothallis, a group of orchids native to the Americas. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of this plant with other species within the orchid family.

intro: Pleurothallis lagarophyta, commonly known as the "Lagarophyta Orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. The Lagarophyta Orchid is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
